title: Traitor in our Midst

"'''Traitor in our Midst'''" is an adventure in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''. It is set in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].

==Plot summary==
During a layover on the planet [[Galtea/Legends|Galtea]], a refugee rescued from [[Pembric II]] named [[The Wraith|Drenn]] sends a coded signal to a roving [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fleet, then sets up a plan to assassinate [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]]. Drenn is actually a spy and saboteur codenamed "the Wraith", and working for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]. During the following [[Battle of Galtea|battle]], the ''FarStar'' engages several Imperial vessels, and the Wraith poisons Adrimetrum using toxin from the planet [[Sebiris]], and she falls into a [[Coma/Legends|coma]]. Retreating from the battle, the crew of the corvette begin an investigation into Adrimetrum's poisoning, and [[Breslin Drake]], who had been tracking the Wraith, recommends they travel to Sebiris since the Wraith was known to frequent the planet.

On the planet, the crew negotiate with the native [[Sebiri]], who agree to give them the antidote. However, Drenn is recognized by the Sebiri, and his cover is blown. A skirmish ensues, and the Wraith escapes. The crew of the ''FarStar'' manage to procure the antidote, and revive Adrimetrum.
